title: davwad3's Perfect Minecraft
description: A modpack that aims to make Minecraft perfect.
body:
This modpack aims to make Minecraft a better experience with better combat, exploration, and bosses. The main focus is adventure and immersion, to make the game feel better to play, along with plenty of things to explore and do. It also adds plenty of qol features to make the game even nicer.

  Throughout playing, you will encounter dangers with valuable rewards, explore the world and its many wonders, and experience Minecraft in a new, more fun way. Enjoy!
